'''鈭歮-s-z''' ('''kamasaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaginalize|vaginalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaginalize|vaginalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-s-z
|-
! Lemma
| kamasaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimasaz|thimasaz]] || [[word:jimasaz|jimasaz]] || [[word:shimasaz|shimasaz]] || [[word:kimasaz|kimasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumasaz|thuthumasaz]] || [[word:jujumasaz|jujumasaz]] || [[word:shushumasaz|shushumasaz]] || [[word:kukumasaz|kukumasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumasaz|thumasaz]] || [[word:jumasaz|jumasaz]] || [[word:shumasaz|shumasaz]] || [[word:kumasaz|kumasaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumasaz|thumasaz]] || [[word:jumasaz|jumasaz]] || [[word:shumasaz|shumasaz]] || [[word:kumasaz|kumasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themasaz|themasaz]] || [[word:jemasaz|jemasaz]] || [[word:shemasaz|shemasaz]] || [[word:kemasaz|kemasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomasaz|thothomasaz]] || [[word:jojomasaz|jojomasaz]] || [[word:shoshomasaz|shoshomasaz]] || [[word:kokomasaz|kokomasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomasaz|thomasaz]] || [[word:jomasaz|jomasaz]] || [[word:shomasaz|shomasaz]] || [[word:komasaz|komasaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomasaz|thomasaz]] || [[word:jomasaz|jomasaz]] || [[word:shomasaz|shomasaz]] || [[word:komasaz|komasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙masaz|th忙masaz]] || [[word:j忙masaz|j忙masaz]] || [[word:sh忙masaz|sh忙masaz]] || [[word:k忙masaz|k忙masaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamasaz|thathamasaz]] || [[word:jajamasaz|jajamasaz]] || [[word:shashamasaz|shashamasaz]] || [[word:kakamasaz|kakamasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamasaz|thamasaz]] || [[word:jamasaz|jamasaz]] || [[word:shamasaz|shamasaz]] || [[word:kamasaz|kamasaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamasaz|thamasaz]] || [[word:jamasaz|jamasaz]] || [[word:shamasaz|shamasaz]] || [[word:kamasaz|kamasaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamasaz|shamasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamasaz|goshamasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamasaz|gokishamasaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamasazn眉|shamasazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamasaznkn眉|goshamasaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasazn眉|gokishamasazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamasazsh毛|shamasazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamasaznksh毛|goshamasaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamasazsh毛|gokishamasazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasazro|shamasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasaznkro|goshamasaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasazro|gokishamasazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasazmu|shamasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasaznkmu|goshamasaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasazmu|gokishamasazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamasazsher|shamasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamasaznksher|goshamasaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamasazsher|gokishamasazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamasazng|shamasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamasaznkng|goshamasaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamasazng|gokishamasazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamasazya|shamasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamasaznkya|goshamasaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamasazya|gokishamasazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamasazyam|shamasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamasaznkyam|goshamasaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamasazyam|gokishamasazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasazn眉sh毛|shamasazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasaznkn眉sh毛|goshamasaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasazn眉sh毛|gokishamasazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasazn眉ro|shamasazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasaznkn眉ro|goshamasaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasazn眉ro|gokishamasazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasazn眉mu|shamasazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasaznkn眉mu|goshamasaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasazn眉mu|gokishamasazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasazsh毛n眉|shamasazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasaznksh毛n眉|goshamasaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasazsh毛n眉|gokishamasazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasazsh毛ro|shamasazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasaznksh毛ro|goshamasaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasazsh毛ro|gokishamasazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasazsh毛mu|shamasazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasaznksh毛mu|goshamasaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasazsh毛mu|gokishamasazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasazron眉|shamasazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasaznkron眉|goshamasaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasazron眉|gokishamasazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasazrosh毛|shamasazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasaznkrosh毛|goshamasaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasazrosh毛|gokishamasazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamasazromu|shamasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamasaznkromu|goshamasaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamasazromu|gokishamasazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamasazmun眉|shamasazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamasaznkmun眉|goshamasaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamasazmun眉|gokishamasazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamasazmush毛|shamasazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamasaznkmush毛|goshamasaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamasazmush毛|gokishamasazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamasazmuro|shamasazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamasaznkmuro|goshamasaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamasazmuro|gokishamasazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
